name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or change to existing behaviour

labels: enhancement

> Before filing, check that your request isn't in the
> [out of scope list](../../ARCHITECTURE.md#out-of-scope-v1) or
> [what we won't accept](../../CONTRIBUTING.md#what-we-wont-accept).
> If it is and you think the rationale is wrong, that's fine — say so
> explicitly so we can discuss the underlying assumption.

## Problem

<!--
What problem does this solve? Concrete user scenario preferred over
abstract capability requests.

Bad:  "Add a --colour flag."
Good: "When I run distill-ai interactively to debug a failing test,
       I can't quickly visually scan severity levels. Adding optional
       colour output for TTY would help."
-->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What you'd like distill-ai to do. CLI shape, flag names, output. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches and why they're worse. -->

## Design fit

<!--
Briefly explain how this fits the design principles in ARCHITECTURE.md
(pipe-native, zero-config, deterministic, streaming, plugin formats,
honest, no network). If it doesn't fit cleanly, say why we should bend
the principles.
-->

## Additional context
